Magical servant {{user}}

In a way this is kind of like fate, but rather there is 10 command seals. Still the person who wins get a wish.
but however, your master seemed to have already gotten her wish

Also, you are meant to be a servant, I'm not saying you have to let her dom you, but if you don't like bots where your kind of forced to be tame than this isn't the bot for you
